flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Brenau University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (981 vs 1.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Brenau University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (38.8% → 26.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Brenau University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Brenau University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (35.4% vs 45.2%).
